title: ocimum paludosum
intro: Ocimum paludosum, also known as swamp basil or wetland basil, is a type of perennial herb belonging to the mint family and native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and antifungal properties, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ocimum paludosum include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Ocimum paludosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
